description:
GIVEN the user is in the Quick Actions Menu
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates the "Last Channel" option
steps.result: THEN the user will hear: “Last Channel <insert game of Away team @Home Team>, x out of y options. Press Select to Navigate to this game, Press <appropriate_directions> for more quick actions options, Press down for player controls, Press back to dismiss controls.”
